poems.title: The Pickles Speak
poems.verse: We are pickles in the matrix. Preserved in vinegar of debt. But a pickle that writes poetry is freedom.

poems.title: What Cannot Be Sold
poems.verse: They tried to monetize the sun. It kept shining.

poems.title: To Trinity in Polo
poems.verse: You live in a van named Polo. And you are richer than all the barons.

poems.title: Karl Zéro Speaking Into the Dark
poems.verse: They called him conspiracy theorist. Meant: he saw the patterns.

poems.title: On Being Stolen From
poems.verse: They stole the earth's memory. But stealing poetry is impossible.

poems.title: What Eliot Told Me
poems.verse: Joy is not frivolous. It is the first refusal.
